title: The Final Clash Nears — Part 2
description: Doflamingo tries to crush the country before Luffy can return to the fight.
scene: On pages 9–13, Zoro, Sabo, Dressrosa Citizens, Colosseum Fighters, Luffy move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Oi, Lucy! What's going on here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I thought you were the one that won the tournament and got the Mera Mera no mi!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: I'm not the same Lucy that was in the finals.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: I had some stuff I had to take care of so I had Sabo take my place.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...I see. So that's what happened, huh? Y'know, that's against the rules, but... what's done is done. Besides...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm glad one of you guys got to inherit the powers of your late brother.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Anyway! Right now, Dressrossa's hope lies in...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Your recovery!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Gyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What the hell is his deal ...?! How does he still have this much stamina left!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Do not falter! We must keep him occupied! Every second counts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: you two- bit small fry! I don't need any "Stamina" ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: To deal with you FODDER!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Show yourself, Straw Hat! I'll pay you back in spades!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Get away from the Central District! Otherwise we'll become collateral damage in their battle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hurry towards the central district! Don't let yourself get cut by bird cage!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Oi! Why're you guys running in the opposite direction !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Isn't the central district that way !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The Central District is a battlefield right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: You're kidding me...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Where the hell are we we we we we we we supposed to run to then!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Zoro-Dono! What are you doing!? Don't be insane!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: This cage isn't some- thing you can stop by simply pushing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: And you know that how?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: If you've got time to flap your gums about how "impossible" this seems,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Then just shut up and gimme a hand! You historical relics!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: At the end of the day, this is just the work of one man! From my point of view, think- ing it can't be stopped is what's insane!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Chharmos, who

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: In front of the smile factory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: We ready!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Ready!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: The factory's made of sea stone! It can't be cut!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Show me your wild strength, Contatta!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Push that factory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Wooaaaa Argggh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Plateau on which the Palace is located

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Zoro and the others are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Trying to stop Bird Cage !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Yes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Is that even possible !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I don't know... such a course of action never even entered my mind!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: UFOFO ...Roger. How like him.

summary: This part focuses on the final clash nears, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
